arts.ttl: “I’m not proud of that” – Plymouth Argyle star regrets performance at previous club
arts.sum: Victor Palsson had featured in Plymouth Argyle’s surprise win over Liverpool in the FA Cup at the weekend. It was the midfielder’s 15th appearance of the season, as he came on in the second half and helped Miron Muslic’s side grab a historic 1-0 win at Home Park.
